title: MLB Next-Day Outlook
subtitle: Projected board built before confirmed lineups and final starter validation.

pick_of_day.summary: Strong environment, but still carrying an unknown-starter penalty until the matchup is fully confirmed.

rows.why: Base power lane is strong, but outlook stage still discounts starter uncertainty and lineup slot risk.
Still useful as an outlook lane, but not clean enough to rate like a confirmed board.

games.note: High power environment, but the board is still discounting any lane that depends on a not-yet-confirmed starter or lineup spot.
Useful next-day target game, but weather and lineup order are still waiting to settle.

notes: Outlook Board runs before all inputs are locked.
Unknown starters, projected lineup slots, and early weather uncertainty should all reduce final score.
